allow: Bash(curl -s --max-time 8 -H "User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36 \(KHTML, like Gecko\) Chrome/124.0 Safari/537.36" -H "Accept: application/json" -H "Referer: https://finance.yahoo.com/" "https://query2.finance.yahoo.com/v8/finance/chart/%5EBSESN?interval=1d&range=1d")

Bash(curl -s --max-time 8 -H "User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36" "https://query1.finance.yahoo.com/v7/finance/quote?symbols=%5EBSESN,%5ENSEI,HDFCBANK.NS,TCS.NS,RELIANCE.NS,INFY.NS")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(q['symbol'], q.get\('regularMarketPrice'\), q.get\('regularMarketChangePercent','?'\)\) for q in d['quoteResponse']['result']]")

Bash(curl -s --max-time 8 -H "User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36 \(KHTML, like Gecko\) Chrome/124.0 Safari/537.36" -H "Accept: application/json" -H "Referer: https://finance.yahoo.com/" "https://query2.finance.yahoo.com/v8/finance/chart/%5ENSEI?interval=1d&range=1d")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); m=d['chart']['result'][0]['meta']; print\('Nifty:', m['regularMarketPrice'], '| prev:', m['chartPreviousClose']\)")
